messages: Hi! I came across your profile and I'm really impressed with your background.
We have an exciting position that would be perfect for you. Salary range is $180k-$220k.
To fast-track your application, could you fill out this quick form? It just needs your basic info and SSN for the background check.
hints: Unsolicited job offer with unusually high salary
Asks for SSN before any interview

messages: Did you see this video of you? It's going viral lol
Let me know what you think!!
hints: Vague reference to 'a video of you' — classic bait
Link goes to suspicious external domain
Account may be compromised or impersonated
